dashboard.databaseManagementTip: Database Management is a licensed feature, please activate it in License Management
dashboard.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
dashboard.confirmResetMsg: Are you sure you want to reset this user's password?
dashboard.confirmRejectMsg: Are you sure you want to reject this password reset request?
dashboard.systemOverview: This system is a comprehensive management platform for educational and training institutions, covering the full business process from course scheduling, student management to fee statistics. Feature modules are divided into two categories by authorization:
dashboard.advancedAuthActivate: Needs to be activated in "License Management" before use.
dashboard.featureCourseManagement: Course Management: Course code/name maintenance, batch import
dashboard.featureManualScheduling: Manual Scheduling: Flexible scheduling by teacher/class/room/course, automatic conflict detection
dashboard.featureScheduleStatusTracking: Schedule Status Tracking: Pending, Completed, Postponed, Cancelled
dashboard.featureStudentAttendance: Student Attendance: Present/Leave/Absent check-in, absent auto-marked for make-up
dashboard.featureDualView: Calendar view and table view dual-mode display of course schedules
dashboard.featureConstraintManagement: Constraint Management: Hard constraints (teacher/student/class/room time constraints) and soft constraints
dashboard.featureHolidayManagement: Holiday Management: Holiday maintenance and batch import, schedules automatically avoid holidays
dashboard.featureTeacherManagement: Teacher Management: Information maintenance, course association, active/resigned status
dashboard.featureStudentManagement: Student Management: Profile maintenance, class assignment, multi-dimensional filtering and search
dashboard.featureClassManagement: Class Management: Class information, student assignment, trial/formal class marking
dashboard.featureLeaveManagement: Leave Management: Teacher/student leave records, schedules automatically avoid after leave
dashboard.featureTeacherVisibility: Teacher Visibility Control: When enabled, teachers can only see their own related courses, classes and schedules
dashboard.featureUserManagement: User Management: Multi-role permissions (Super Admin/System Admin/Course Admin/System Auditor)
dashboard.featureTeacherRoleAuth: Teacher Role Authorization: Fee management teacher, grade management teacher, evaluation management teacher, operation management teacher
dashboard.featureLdapAuth: LDAP Unified Authentication: Support LDAP/AD domain account login, automatic role mapping
dashboard.featureOpenRegistration: Open Registration: Time-limited user self-registration (auto-closes in 3 days)
dashboard.featureLoginTimeout: Login Timeout Configuration: Custom token expiration time (5 minutes ~ 30 days)
dashboard.featurePasswordReset: Password Reset: User self-service application, admin review and reset
dashboard.featureEmailNotification: Email Notification: SMTP email sends schedule reminders and change notifications to associated teachers/students
dashboard.featureSystemLogs: System Logs: Operation log recording, log archive backup and clearing
dashboard.featureSiteInfo: Site Information: Organization name/LOGO/website/QR code and other global parameter configuration
dashboard.featureI18n: Language Switching: Real-time Chinese/English interface language switching
dashboard.featureManualScheduleCreate: Manual Scheduling: Flexible creation of course schedules
dashboard.featureScheduleQuery: Schedule Query: Filter and view scheduling records by conditions
dashboard.featureLeaveAdjustment: Leave/Rescheduling: Convenient handling of temporary changes
dashboard.featureGeneticAlgorithm: Genetic Algorithm: Suitable for large-scale scheduling scenarios, global search for better solutions
dashboard.featureBacktrackAlgorithm: Backtracking Algorithm: Exact search for optimal solution, suitable for small and medium scale
dashboard.featureHybridAlgorithm: Hybrid Algorithm: Combines advantages of both, recommended
dashboard.featureSchedulePreview: Schedule Preview: Generated results can be selected individually, edited before saving
dashboard.featureFeeItemManagement: Student Fee Item Management: Add/edit fee items, associate with courses and classes
dashboard.featurePaymentRecord: Payment Records: Support multiple payment methods, discount amount management
dashboard.featureRefundManagement: Refund Management: Refund process, refund methods and refund notes
dashboard.featurePaymentReminder: Payment Reminder: Automatic reminder for pending payments
dashboard.featureGradeEntry: Grade Entry: Single/batch add student grades
dashboard.featureGradeTracking: Grade Change Tracking: Compare historical grade change trends
dashboard.featureGradeTrendChart: Grade Proportion Trend Chart: ECharts visualization of historical grade changes
dashboard.featureGradeMultiDimension: Multi-dimensional Comparison: Filter and analyze by course, class, student
dashboard.featureEvaluationTemplate: Evaluation Template Management: Custom evaluation dimensions and weights by course type
dashboard.featureComprehensivePortrait: Comprehensive Ability Portrait: Support "Learning Attitude/Knowledge Mastery/Practical Ability/Innovative Thinking/Collaboration Literacy" five-dimension or "Moral/Intellectual/Physical/Aesthetic/Labor" five-dimension model
dashboard.featureSubjectPortrait: Subject Ability Portrait: Subject-specific evaluation dimensions (e.g., listening/speaking/reading/writing for languages, logical reasoning for math, etc.)
dashboard.featureEvaluationPeriod: Evaluation Period Management: Flexible recording by semester (Fall semester/Spring semester)
dashboard.featureRadarChart: Radar Chart Visualization: ECharts five-dimension/multi-dimension radar chart intuitively displays student ability structure
dashboard.featureEvaluationTeacher: Evaluation Management Teacher: Independently authorized evaluation management permissions, fine-grained access control
dashboard.featureWechatWebhook: Enterprise WeChat group robot Webhook notification
dashboard.featureScheduleReminder: Schedule Reminder: New, update, complete, postpone, cancel and other information pushed to teacher info group/class info group respectively
dashboard.featureManagementNotification: Management Notification: Fee management and other information push
dashboard.featureNaturalLanguageParse: Natural Language Command Parsing: Complete adding courses/teachers/students/schedules/leaves etc. with one sentence
dashboard.featureDualModeParse: Dual-mode Parsing: Rule parsing (built-in) and AI model parsing (requires model API KEY) (Deepseek/Qwen/OpenAI/Custom)
dashboard.featureCommandExampleManagement: Command Example Management: Custom smart commands, built-in example library, support batch AI/regex comparison testing
dashboard.featureKPIDashboard: KPI Dashboard: Revenue/conversion rate/student count/teacher count/lesson count/attendance rate and other core indicators
dashboard.featureVisualCharts: Visual Charts: Course distribution, teacher workload, revenue-related chart analysis (can be hidden with one click), monthly trends, etc.
dashboard.featureConversionFunnel: Trial conversion funnel, teacher efficiency ranking
dashboard.featureFullscreenExport: Fullscreen mode display, support image export
dashboard.featureFloatingEntry: Desktop floating quick entry, one-click access to smart commands, scheduling, creation and other common functions
dashboard.featureManualBackup: Manual Backup: One-click export of SQL backup file
dashboard.featureAutoBackup: Auto Backup: Scheduled backup (hourly/daily/weekly), automatic old backup cleanup
dashboard.featureDatabaseRestore: Database Restore: Restore from backup file
dashboard.featureBackupFileManagement: Backup File Management: List view, download, delete
dashboard.siteIpPlaceholder: Enter internal IP, e.g., 10.11.12.99 (system will auto-construct http://IP:port)
dashboard.siteIpTip: Tip: This IP is used to construct file access URLs, ensure uploaded images, LOGO and other resources can be accessed normally. Must fill in the accurate and real IP address hosting this course management system, otherwise files cannot be uploaded and accessed
dashboard.orgWebsitePlaceholder: Enter organization website link, e.g., https://www.example.com
dashboard.orgWebsiteTip: Tip: This link will be displayed in the website footer and WeChat/email notifications
dashboard.wechatQrcodeTip: Tip: Upload WeChat official account QR code image, will be displayed in the website footer and WeChat/email notifications
dashboard.workWechatQrcodeTip: Tip: Upload Enterprise WeChat QR code image, will be displayed in the website footer and WeChat/email notifications
dashboard.courseVisibilityTipOn: When enabled, teacher role users can only see their own related courses, classes (and students associated with those classes), and schedules
dashboard.courseVisibilityTipOff: When disabled, all teachers can see all courses, classes, students, and schedules in the system
dashboard.courseEditTipOn: When enabled, only super admins can edit schedules with completed/postponed/cancelled status
dashboard.courseEditTipOff: When disabled, course management teachers can also edit schedules with "completed/postponed/cancelled" status
dashboard.courseDeleteTipOn: When enabled, only super admins can delete schedules with completed/postponed/cancelled status
dashboard.courseDeleteTipOff: When disabled, course management teachers can also delete schedules with "completed/postponed/cancelled" status
dashboard.courseManageTeacherPlaceholder: Select course management teachers (not restricted by teacher course visibility and user roles)
dashboard.courseManageTeacherTip: Tip: Selected teachers will not be restricted by the "Teacher Visibility Restriction" option and teacher role, and will not be restricted from accessing courses, classes, and schedules
dashboard.feeManageTeacherPlaceholder: Select fee management teachers (can access fee management module)
dashboard.feeManageTeacherTip: Tip: Selected teachers can access the "Fee Management" module in "Student Management" (requires "Fee Management" license to be activated), not restricted by teacher role for student fee access
dashboard.gradeManageTeacherPlaceholder: Select grade management teachers (can access grade management module)
dashboard.gradeManageTeacherTip: Tip: Selected teachers can access the "Grade Management" module in "Student Management" (requires "Student Grade Management" license to be activated), not restricted by teacher role for student grade access
dashboard.evaluationManageTeacherPlaceholder: Select evaluation management teachers (can access evaluation management module)
dashboard.evaluationManageTeacherTip: Tip: Selected teachers can access the "Evaluation Management" module in "Student Management" (requires "Student Evaluation" license to be activated), not restricted by teacher role for student evaluation access
dashboard.operationManageTeacherPlaceholder: Select operation management teachers (can access dashboard)
dashboard.operationManageTeacherTip: Tip: Selected course management teachers can access the "Dashboard" module to view KPI data, statistical charts, and other operational information
dashboard.hoursPerLessonTip: Tip: Set how many hours each lesson equals. Default is 2 hours (i.e., 2 lesson periods). Supports one decimal place, e.g., 1.5 hours. This parameter affects fee calculation and statistics.
dashboard.gradeOrderTip: Tip: Drag the left icon to adjust the grade order. Grade order affects the sorting and continuity in grade trend charts.
dashboard.examStageOrderTip: Tip: Drag the left icon to adjust the exam stage order. Order affects the X-axis sorting and continuity in grade trend charts.
dashboard.emailConfigDesc: Configure SMTP email parameters for sending schedule reminders, homework notifications, and fee reminders.
dashboard.smtpPasswordPlaceholder: Enter email password or authorization code
dashboard.emailRecipientsTip: Tip: Selected recipients will receive schedule reminder emails related to them at the defined reminder times (requires teachers/students to have email configured)
dashboard.wechatLicenseRequired: WeChat notification is a licensed feature
dashboard.wechatLicenseActivate: Please activate it in License Management
dashboard.wechatConfigDesc: Configure management notifications and schedule reminders. Class webhook URLs are configured in Class Management.
dashboard.selectWechatClassesPlaceholder: Select classes to enable WeChat notifications
dashboard.wechatClassTip: Tip: Selected classes will receive WeChat notifications. Please ensure webhook URLs are configured in Class Management
dashboard.aiLicenseRequired: Smart Command is a licensed feature
dashboard.aiLicenseActivate: Please activate it in License Management
dashboard.aiConfigDesc: Configure AI LLM API for smart command parsing. If not configured, the system will use rule-based parsing.
dashboard.enableAITip: Tip: When enabled, AI model will be used for command parsing; otherwise, rule-based parsing will be used
dashboard.selectAIProviderTip: Tip: Select a different AI service provider
dashboard.apiUrlTip: Tip: DeepSeek API URL is https://api.deepseek.com/chat/completions. Qwen uses https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1/chat/completions
dashboard.apiKeyTip: Tip: API key obtained from the AI service provider
dashboard.modelTip: Tip: Recommended: deepseek-v4-flash (fast) or deepseek-v4-pro (high quality). For Qwen: qwen-plus (balanced) or qwen-turbo (fast)
dashboard.timeoutTip: Tip: Maximum wait time for API requests
dashboard.deepseekDesc: Register on DeepSeek platform and obtain API key
dashboard.qwenDesc: Register Alibaba Cloud account and enable DashScope service
dashboard.ernieDesc: Register Baidu Smart Cloud and enable ERNIE Bot service
dashboard.customDesc: Configure other API services compatible with OpenAI format
dashboard.deepseekDeprecationNote: Note: deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner will be deprecated on July 24, 2026
dashboard.qwenCompatibilityNote: Note: Uses OpenAI-compatible interface, format is identical to OpenAI
dashboard.aiNote1: AI parsing incurs API call fees, please use reasonably
dashboard.aiNote2: It's recommended to use rule-based parsing first, and enable AI parsing when necessary
dashboard.aiNote3: Ensure API key security, do not disclose to others
dashboard.aiNote4: AI features can only be used normally after a successful test connection
dashboard.userConfigDesc: Configure user authentication methods, including login timeout, LDAP authentication, and open registration.
dashboard.loginTimeoutTip: Tip: Set the expiration time for user login tokens, range 5-43200 minutes (30 days), default 1440 minutes (24 hours). After modification, newly logged-in users will use the new timeout
dashboard.openRegistrationTip: Tip: When enabled, users can register accounts via email on the login page. The default role after registration is "Course Admin"
dashboard.openRegistrationAutoClose: Open registration will automatically close after 3 days to prevent unauthorized registration. Administrators need to re-enable it after expiration.
dashboard.ldapEnableTip: Tip: When enabled, users can log in with LDAP accounts; when disabled, only local accounts can be used
dashboard.ldapServerTip: Tip: Hostname or IP address of the LDAP server
dashboard.ldapPortTip: Tip: Standard LDAP port is 389, LDAPS port is 636
dashboard.ldapSslTip: Tip: When SSL is enabled, LDAPS protocol is used (port 636)
dashboard.adminDnTip: Tip: LDAP admin account DN for searching users
dashboard.adminPasswordTip: Tip: LDAP admin password for searching users
dashboard.userSearchBaseTip: Tip: Starting DN for user search
dashboard.userSearchFilterTip: Tip: Use {username} as the username placeholder, e.g., (uid={username}) or (sAMAccountName={username})
dashboard.userDnTemplateTip: Tip: If this field is filled, authentication will be performed directly using the template without user search
dashboard.defaultRoleTip: Tip: Default role for LDAP users on first login (Super Admin role requires manual assignment)
dashboard.roleMappingTip: Tip: Select "Map by LDAP attribute" to automatically assign roles based on user's organizational unit or group membership
dashboard.logConfigDesc: Configure system log recording level and output control.
dashboard.disableBackendLogTip: Tip: When disabled, no system logs will be recorded
dashboard.logLevelTip: Tip: Only logs at and above the specified level will be recorded
dashboard.disableFrontendLogTip: Tip: When disabled, no logs will be output to the browser console
dashboard.examplesSearchPlaceholder: Fuzzy search: category, action name, example text, expected intent, description...
dashboard.expectedIntentValues: Available values: add_course, update_course, search_courses, add_teacher, update_teacher, search_teachers, add_class, update_class, search_classes, add_student, update_student, search_students, add_room, update_room, search_rooms, add_leave, add_holiday, collect_fee, refund_fee, search_fees, add_grade, search_grades, create_schedule, complete_schedule, cancel_schedule, postpone_schedule, search_schedules, advanced_search
dashboard.expectedFieldsTip: Fill in the complete data structure (JSON format) that should be obtained after parsing, including action, path, storage_data, etc.
dashboard.selectTemplateDesc: Select a template as a base, then modify field values according to actual needs

license.title: License Management
license.defaultModules: Default Licensed Modules (No additional payment required)
license.referralCodeTip: Share this referral code with other organizations. They will get a discount using your code, and you will earn rewards.
license.featureGradeTrendHighlights: Grade visualization, trend analysis, multi-dimensional comparison
license.featureGradeTrendDetails:
In-depth analysis for student grade management:
• Grade Proportion Trend Chart: ECharts visualization of historical grade changes
• Grade Change Tracking: Compare historical grade change trends
• Multi-dimensional Comparison: Filter and analyze by course, class, student
license.featureFeeManagementHighlights: Fee item management, payment/refund, payment reminder
license.featureFeeManagementDetails:
Full-process student fee management:
• Student Fee Item Management: Add/edit fee items, associate with courses and classes
• Payment Records: Support multiple payment methods, discount amount management
• Refund Management: Refund process, refund methods and refund notes
• Payment Reminder: Automatic reminder for pending payments
• Fee Report Export
license.featureSmartSchedulingDetails:
Smart algorithm scheduling for different scales:
• Genetic Algorithm: Suitable for large-scale scheduling, global search for better solutions
• Backtracking Algorithm: Exact search for optimal solution, suitable for small and medium scale
• Hybrid Algorithm: Combines advantages of both, recommended
• Schedule Preview: Generated results can be selected individually, edited before saving
license.featureWechatNotifyHighlights: WeCom group bot, course reminder push
license.featureWechatNotifyDetails:
WeChat notification management, timely information delivery:
• Enterprise WeChat group robot Webhook notification
• Schedule Reminder: New, update, complete, postpone, cancel and other information push
• Management Notification: Fee management and other information push
license.featureSmartCommandHighlights: Natural language parsing, dual mode, example library
license.featureSmartCommandDetails:
Smart command management, complete operations with one sentence:
• Natural Language Command Parsing: Complete adding courses/teachers/students/schedules/leaves etc. with one sentence
• Dual-mode Parsing: Rule parsing (built-in) and AI model parsing (requires model API KEY)
• Command Example Management: Custom smart commands, built-in example library, support batch AI/regex comparison testing
license.featureDashboardViewHighlights: KPI dashboard, visual charts, fullscreen export
license.featureDashboardViewDetails:
Dashboard, core indicators at a glance:
• KPI Dashboard: Revenue/conversion rate/student count/teacher count/lesson count/attendance rate and other core indicators
• Visual Charts: Course distribution, teacher workload, revenue-related chart analysis, monthly trends, etc.
• Trial conversion funnel, teacher efficiency ranking
• Fullscreen mode, support image export
license.featureFloatingSphereDetails:
Quick action button, one-click access to common features:
• Desktop floating quick entry, one-click access to smart commands, scheduling, create and other common features
• Draggable positioning, auto-snap to edge
license.featureDatabaseManagementDetails:
Database management, data security guaranteed:
• Manual Backup: One-click export of SQL backup file
• Auto Backup: Scheduled backup (hourly/daily/weekly), auto-cleanup of old backups
• Database Restore: Restore from backup file
• Backup File Management: List view, download, delete
license.featureStudentEvaluationHighlights: Evaluation template, five-dimension portrait, radar chart
license.featureStudentEvaluationDetails:
Student evaluation management, comprehensive ability assessment:
• Evaluation Template Management: Custom evaluation dimensions and weights by course type
• Comprehensive Ability Portrait: Support five-dimension model (Learning Attitude/Knowledge Mastery/Practical Ability/Innovative Thinking/Collaboration Literacy)
• Subject Ability Portrait: Subject-specific evaluation dimensions
• Evaluation Period Management: Flexible recording by semester
• Radar Chart Visualization: ECharts five-dimension radar chart intuitively displays student ability structure
• Evaluation Management Teacher: Independently authorized evaluation management permissions

license.allModulesAuthorizedDesc: All feature modules are currently in "Authorized" status. If you need to change the authorization, click the "Deactivate" button on the corresponding feature module to deactivate it, then re-apply for add-on authorization. Note: 1. When deactivating a License, all associated module authorizations will be deactivated; 2. When adding authorization for feature modules, do not re-select already authorized modules;

license.purchaseNoteDetail:
The vendor will contact you as soon as they receive your license order. Please monitor your phone, email, and WeChat (we solemnly promise to keep your information confidential and will not disclose, forward, or share it; please also keep the vendor's contact information confidential, thank you for your cooperation); If no vendor contacts you within 2 hours, please use the backup contact method below to notify the vendor;
After both parties confirm the information and payment, the vendor will provide you with a License Key for the corresponding features and license type. If you have previously purchased a permanent license, or a temporary/subscription license that has not yet expired, but the license key became invalid due to system redeployment and machine code change, please contact the vendor for a free replacement license key.
license.purchaseNoteDetailShort:
The vendor will contact you as soon as they receive your license order. Please monitor your phone, email, and WeChat (we solemnly promise to keep your information confidential and will not disclose, forward, or share it; please also keep the vendor's contact information confidential, thank you for your cooperation); If no vendor contacts you within 2 hours, please use the backup contact method below to notify the vendor;
